_readme: Edit this file to customize your Family Archives site. All changes take effect on next page load — no rebuild needed.
tagline: A curated collection of our most treasured moments — from celebrations and holidays to ordinary days worth remembering.

colors._readme: Armenian flag colors. Adjust hex values to tweak the palette.

social.ogDescription: Our family video archive — organized, preserved, and shared with love.

playlist_descriptions._readme: Add a description for each playlist by its exact name. Leave blank or omit to show no description.
playlist_descriptions.Example Playlist: A brief description shown on the home page card and playlist header.
